dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7133 IH: Merchant Codes Can Save Lives Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Frost introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Financial Services

form.official-title: To prohibit States from prohibiting or otherwise deterring the usage of any merchant category code established by the International Organization for Standardization, including codes that identify firearm merchants and ammunition merchants.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Merchant Codes Can Save Lives Act.

section.header: Preemption relating to merchant category codes
section.text: Section 5313 of title 31, United States Code, is amended by inserting after subsection (g) the following:

paragraph.text: No State may prohibit or otherwise deter the usage of any merchant category code established by the International Organization for Standardization for identifying firearm merchants or payment card transactions involving the purchase of a firearm, firearm ammunition, ammunition components for use with firearms, or firearm accessories.
The Attorney General may bring a civil action in the appropriate district court to enforce this subsection.
